message:
perf(cx/scope): stack-pin futures in scope race/select patterns

Replace heap-allocated `Box::pin(...)` with stack-pinned `std::pin::pin!()`
for join futures used in `Select::new()` race patterns. Futures are now
scoped into blocks so they drop before the handles are reused for draining
the loser (e.g., `h1.join(cx).await`). This eliminates per-race heap
allocation and removes the explicit `drop(f1)` / `drop(f2)` calls that
were previously needed to trigger loser cancellation via the heap-pinned
JoinFuture's Drop impl.

Three race sites updated: `race()`, `spawn_with_delayed_backup()`, and
the nested backup race within `spawn_with_delayed_backup`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
